requirement_source: mOzNDhn322 (PRD: orvex-studio-staging) — FR-STG1..29 + NFR-STG1..6; grounded by P5R7eCXJA0 (PRD Addendum) and GOacy9kdJz (Architecture: AD-1..AD-14)

epics.title: [EPIC] staging: Service foundation — six-tier satellite, contracts codegen, auth, RLS store & event spine

stories.title: [staging] Service skeleton — six-tier layout, cmd binaries, env-only config, health/ready
[staging] Contracts codegen wiring + AGPL-import denylist + drift gate
[staging] Auth middleware via orvex-studio-lib/pkg/auth + tenant GUC + VerifyFresh
[staging] Postgres store baseline — RLS fail-closed migration 0001, UUIDv7, testcontainers
[staging] Transactional outbox + relay + spine consumer + OTel obs

epics.title: [EPIC] staging: Staged proposal intake — proposals, ChangeSets, provenance, pointers & quotas

stories.title: [staging] Submit Proposal — 5 operations, DfM/PM validation, base-version stamp, receipt
[staging] ChangeSet lifecycle state machine — open→applied/expired, explicit + idle submit
[staging] Provenance — two-sided immutable attribution keyed on verified principal
[staging] Pointer-state payloads — S3 tenant-keyed bodies, sha256 hash in queue rows
[staging] Admission control & quotas — in-flight caps, 402 QUOTA_EXCEEDED, depth/age alerting

epics.title: [EPIC] staging: Librarian triage — disposition, find-before-create routing & hard conflict detection

stories.title: [staging] Disposition production per Proposal — route, confidence, diff, justification
[staging] Find-before-create routing — knowledge dedup, duplicate-of, divert-to-workgraph
[staging] Hard conflict detection — authoritative read, anchor re-resolution, no auto-merge

epics.title: [EPIC] staging: Autonomy dial, trust tiers & batch review queue

stories.title: [staging] Autonomy Dial enforcement — server-side policy verdict per tenant+space
[staging] Trust Tiers — per-producer acceptance history gates auto-apply & throttles
[staging] Review Queue — filtered bulk decide, buckets, mandatory adjudication lane

epics.title: [EPIC] staging: Apply engine, triage-time beautification & scheduled publishing

stories.title: [staging] Apply engine — wiki-api CAS writes, receipts, pause state, rollback, step-APIs
[staging] Beautification at triage — re-author, mechanical done-bar, sha256 artifact
[staging] Scheduled ChangeSet publishing — UTC instant+tzid, cancellable, conflict re-run

epics.title: [EPIC] staging: Librarian learning loop, cold-start & prompt-pack marketplace

stories.title: [staging] Feedback capture — append-only events linked to proposal, disposition, pack version
[staging] Learning application & transparency — exemplars, tiers, held-out harness, changelog
[staging] Cold-start defaults — baseline pack, recommend dial, content-free exemplars
[staging] Prompt-pack marketplace v1-minimal — publish/install/rate, admin-approval install

epics.title: [EPIC] staging: Librarian maintenance mandate — the standing tidy sweeps

stories.title: [staging] Sweep executor + duplicate & merge sweep — corpus near-dup, supersede-merge
[staging] Staleness & verification queue + retrieval trust-gating dependency contract
[staging] Structure & link hygiene sweep — orphans, broken links, misfiled, IA flags
[staging] Beautification sweep — flag pages failing the mechanical bar, propose diffs
[staging] AI-groundability flag + review-state gate — page-meta via wiki-api, knowledge enforces

epics.title: [EPIC] staging: Platform surfaces, events & the hard-cut migration

stories.title: [staging] MCP staging section — staging_* tools, hidden category, per-agent auth
[staging] CLI staging section — orvex-cli staging parity verbs
[staging] Events on the spine — studio.staging.* CloudEvents + contracts catalog
[staging] Hard-cut migration of ALL agent wiki-write surfaces — loud errors, sequenced last
[staging] Curator supersession — Card v1→Proposal verbatim mapping + goldens

epics.title: [EPIC] staging: Scale benchmark & cross-cutting NFR release gate

stories.title: [staging] 100-Proposal load benchmark — submit/triage/apply SLOs as release gate
[staging] Isolation & auditability — apply-rate throttle, per-tenant fairness, immutable audit
[staging] Six-surface E2E + P8 isolation probes — fresh-tenant real-data pass
